description_long: This convenience store consists of a two-story structure with a modern, boxy white building attached to a traditional, brown-roofed section. The storefront features large glass windows and doors, potted plants, and a Japanese sign above the entrance. A small fenced yard with a stylized tree sits to one side, adding a touch of greenery. The rear and side facades are simpler, with small windows, utility piping, and a blue awning over a secondary entrance. The rooflines are flat and gabled, with visible chimneys and vents. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional Japanese architectural elements, making it visually distinctive in an urban setting.
description: A two-story convenience store with a modern white facade, traditional brown-roofed section, large glass storefront, and a small fenced yard with a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entrance, Japanese signage, potted plants, and the combination of modern and traditional building elements.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain white facade, utility piping, small windows, and a secondary door with a blue awning.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, the brown-tiled roof, balcony, and the fenced yard with a stylized tree.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the gabled roof, fenced yard, and the tree, with minimal windows and architectural detail.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular, horizontally mounted sign with Japanese text in black on a white background, placed above the main entrance on the modern white section. No visible illumination or logos.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, a single large glass swinging door with a metal frame and visible handle at the main entrance.
attribute_display_windows: Large, clear glass display windows flank the main entrance, framed in dark metal or wood, with no visible advertisements.
